positive: A minimal, abstract celestial scene featuring a stylized crescent moon surrounded by constellations of geometric, neon-glow stars and nebulae. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for chest-area apparel printing. Use a limited color palette of deep midnight blues, vibrant cosmic purples, and electric cyan highlights. Style: Clean, vectorized linework combined with subtle, gradient-filled watercolor washes. Emphasis on sharp contrast and bold, scalable silhouettes. Perfect for screen printing and digital direct-to-garment applications. Rule of thirds balanced with central symmetry.
